# UX Checklist: Web Framework Research Spike

**Purpose**: Validate that SPEC-004's UX-related requirements are complete, measurable, and reviewable before implementation.
**Created**: 2026-07-05
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are hard local-first gate requirements complete enough to prevent UX scores from influencing candidates that fail self-host, offline, hosted-service, license, footprint, or maintenance gates? [Resolved 2026-07-05, Completeness, Spec §FR-004, Spec §FR-006, Plan §Hard Gates]
- [x] CHK002 Are decision-matrix requirements complete for graph browsing ergonomics, discoverability, visual clarity, and interaction fit as distinct UX criteria? [Resolved 2026-07-05, Completeness, Spec §FR-006, Plan §Weighted Scoring Model]
- [x] CHK003 Are screenshot evidence requirements defined for readability, scale, and reviewer-visible labels or graph details in the decision document? [Resolved 2026-07-05, Completeness, Spec §FR-011, Spec §SC-004, Plan §Prototype Method]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK004 Is "UX and graph-interaction fit" decomposed into unambiguous scoring dimensions rather than a single subjective impression? [Resolved 2026-07-05, Clarity, Plan §Weighted Scoring Model]
- [x] CHK005 Are graph interaction observations specified with expected categories such as pan/zoom, selection, and expand-neighborhood responsiveness rather than open-ended notes? [Resolved 2026-07-05, Clarity, Plan §Prototype Method]
- [x] CHK006 Is the fallback path for missing screenshot or browser tooling clear enough to preserve visual evidence quality? [Resolved 2026-07-05, Clarity, Spec §FR-017, Plan §Prototype Method]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK007 Do the spec, plan, and design concept consistently state that UX leads only after hard gates pass? [Resolved 2026-07-05, Consistency, Spec §FR-006, Plan §Design Concept Decisions Used]
- [x] CHK008 Do screenshot asset paths and report references align across spec, plan, quickstart, and contract? [Resolved 2026-07-05, Consistency, Spec §FR-011, Plan §Artifact Layout]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK009 Can maintainers objectively determine whether the final recommendation was made from weighted scores rather than pre-selection? [Resolved 2026-07-05, Measurability, Spec §SC-001, Spec §SC-002]
- [x] CHK010 Are UX claims required to cite evidence or measurements so "modern", "user-friendly", "readable", and "polished" cannot stand alone as subjective judgments? [Resolved 2026-07-05, Measurability, Spec §FR-006, Plan §Weighted Scoring Model]
- [x] CHK011 Are screenshot evidence outcomes measurable by count, dataset, node/edge counts, capture tool, and limitation notes? [Resolved 2026-07-05, Measurability, Spec §SC-004, Data Model §ScreenshotAsset]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK012 Are requirements defined for candidates with strong UX but failed hard gates, unavailable screenshot tooling, and 1k-node rendering limitations? [Resolved 2026-07-05, Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-017]

## Re-run Assessment

- [x] CHK013 Are UX subcriteria now defined as distinct measurable dimensions with evidence expectations? [Resolved 2026-07-05, Completeness, Spec §FR-006, Plan §Weighted Scoring Model]
- [x] CHK014 Are screenshot readability requirements now measurable through dataset, counts, capture tool, image dimensions, and visible graph details? [Resolved 2026-07-05, Measurability, Spec §FR-011, Spec §SC-004, Plan §Prototype Method]
- [x] CHK015 Are graph interaction observations now categorized by pan/zoom, node selection or focus, details on demand, expand-neighborhood or relationship traversal, and visible status/search affordances? [Resolved 2026-07-05, Clarity, Plan §Prototype Method]
- [x] CHK016 Are subjective UX terms constrained by evidence, measurement, or omission? [Resolved 2026-07-05, Measurability, Spec §FR-006, Plan §Weighted Scoring Model]
- [x] CHK017 Do the updated requirements preserve hard local-first gates before UX scoring? [Resolved 2026-07-05, Consistency, Spec §FR-004, Spec §FR-006, Plan §Hard Gates]
